arabic: ٱقۡتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلۡقَمَرُ
transliteration: Iqtarabati alssaAAatu wainshaqqa alqamaru
translation: The Hour (the time when the present world will end and the Hereafter begin) has drawn near and the moon is breached. ManzilI VII: 54: Qamar
notes: The Arabic word shaqqa has several meanings. Most translators have given it here the meaning of ‘split’ and thus attributed to Prophet Muhammad [peace on him] the performing of the miracle of splitting the moon in two and then rejoining the two parts. Such a miracle – if it did happen – would have indeed been a unique one! The Qur’aan does say that the earlier Prophets were endowed with the gifts of performing various miracles. But none of such miracles involved moon or any other heavenly body! All those miracles were restricted to things of this earth. This miracle attributed to Prophet Muhammad is preposterous on another count as well. Nowhere else in the Holy Book does Allah Almighty mention performance, by Muhammad, of any miracle as those performed by earlier Prophets like Moses and Jesus. The Book, on the other hand, points out the fact that the earlier peoples had failed to follow their Prophets despite the latter showing them the miracles! The stress was therefore laid on Prophet Muhammad’s Ummah to look for miracles in the natural creation of their own selves and of all things around them, and thus attain to faith in Allah Ta’ala. That being the unmistakable tenor throughout in the Qur’aan, it was indeed preposterous for the Prophet to come up suddenly with such an unlikely miracle. Moreover, shaqqa alqamar is meant in this Verse to be the Sign for the approaching end of this world. There were no signs of the approaching Doom over 1400 years ago when this Verse was revealed. But there definitely are such signs now when nation after nation is engaged in piling up weapons of mass destruction [WMD]. And this piling up was preceded by Man’s first visit to the moon in the late sixties [Watch the Video]. This Verse foretold that visit, when the virginity of the surface of the moon was for the first time breached by human steps and man-made tools.

arabic: وَإِن يَرَوۡاْ ءَايَةٗ يُعۡرِضُواْ وَيَقُولُواْ سِحۡرٞ مُّسۡتَمِرّٞ
transliteration: Wain yaraw ayatan yuAAridoo wayaqooloo sihrun mustamirrun
translation: And if they see a sign they turn away and say, “Another delusion!”
notes: And, indeed, the moon-landing feat, watched all over the world, was subsequently condemned as a hoax! And as for its being a Sign for the approaching Doomsday, few –Muslims included – bother!!

arabic: وَكَذَّبُواْ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓاْ أَهۡوَآءَهُمۡۚ وَكُلُّ أَمۡرٖ مُّسۡتَقِرّٞ
transliteration: Wakaththaboo waittabaAAoo ahwaahum wakullu amrin mustaqirrun
translation: And they speak lies and follow their own desires. And every matter does come to a settlement.

arabic: وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزۡدَجَرٌ
transliteration: Walaqad jaahum mina alanbai ma feehi muzdajarun
translation: And surely there has come to them some of the news containing lessons

arabic: حِكۡمَةُۢ بَٰلِغَةٞۖ فَمَا تُغۡنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ
transliteration: Hikmatun balighatun fama tughnee alnnuthuru
translation: In mature wisdom; but warnings avail not! ManzilI VII: 54: Qamar

arabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡۘ يَوۡمَ يَدۡعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَيۡءٖ نُّكُرٍ
transliteration: Fatawalla AAanhum yawma yadAAu alddaAAi ila shayin nukurin
translation: So turn away from them on the Day when the Summoner summons to a thing forbidding.

arabic: خُشَّعًا أَبۡصَٰرُهُمۡ يَخۡرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡأَجۡدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمۡ جَرَادٞ مُّنتَشِرٞ
transliteration: KhushshaAAan absaruhum yakhrujoona mina alajdathi kaannahum jaradun muntashirun
translation: With downcast eyes, they come out of the graves as though they were locusts dispersed,

arabic: مُّهۡطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِۖ يَقُولُ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا يَوۡمٌ عَسِرٞ
transliteration: MuhtiAAeena ila alddaAAi yaqoolu alkafiroona hatha yawmun AAasirun
translation: Hurrying on toward the Summoner, the suppressors of Truth say, “This is a hard day.”

arabic: ۞كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوحٖ فَكَذَّبُواْ عَبۡدَنَا وَقَالُواْ مَجۡنُونٞ وَٱزۡدُجِرَ
transliteration: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohin fakaththaboo AAabdana waqaloo majnoonun waizdujira
translation: Before them, Noah’s people had denied! They denied Our devotee and said he was a mad man! And thus, was he rebuffed! ManzilI VII: 54: Qamar

arabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّي مَغۡلُوبٞ فَٱنتَصِرۡ
transliteration: FadaAAa rabbahu annee maghloobun faintasir
translation: Then he prayed to his Lord, “I am defeated, so help me!”

arabic: فَفَتَحۡنَآ أَبۡوَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٖ مُّنۡهَمِرٖ
transliteration: Fafatahna abwaba alssamai bimain munhamirin
translation: We then opened gates of the sky with pouring water

arabic: وَفَجَّرۡنَا ٱلۡأَرۡضَ عُيُونٗا فَٱلۡتَقَى ٱلۡمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمۡرٖ قَدۡ قُدِرَ
transliteration: Wafajjarna alarda AAuyoonan failtaqa almao AAala amrin qad qudira
translation: And We caused springs in the earth to gush forth, so that the waters met for a predestined purpose. ManzilI VII: 54: Qamar

arabic: وَحَمَلۡنَٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلۡوَٰحٖ وَدُسُرٖ
transliteration: Wahamalnahu AAala thati alwahin wadusurin
translation: And We carried him [Noah] upon something [Ark made] of planks and nails

arabic: تَجۡرِي بِأَعۡيُنِنَا جَزَآءٗ لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
transliteration: Tajree biaAAyunina jazaan liman kana kufira
translation: That sailed under Our observation, in compensation for one [Noah] who was rejected.

arabic: وَلَقَد تَّرَكۡنَٰهَآ ءَايَةٗ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرٖ
transliteration: Walaqad taraknaha ayatan fahal min muddakirin
translation: And We did leave it [Ark] behind as a Sign for posterity; but is there any to take heed?
notes: Refer Verse 11:44 and study note thereon. Also watch YouTube video on discovery of the fossilized remains of the Ark.

arabic: فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
transliteration: Fakayfa kana AAathabee wanuthuri
translation: And see how My punishment was – and My warnings! ManzilI VII: 54: Qamar

arabic: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرٖ
transliteration: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin
translation: And We have certainly made the Qur'aan easy for cultivating Firm Faith in and Remembrance of Me; but is there any to take heed?

arabic: كَذَّبَتۡ عَادٞ فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
transliteration: Kaththabat AAadun fakayfa kana AAathabee wanuthuri
translation: (The ancient tribe of) AAad rejected [divine guidance]. How then was My punishment and My warnings!

arabic: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ رِيحٗا صَرۡصَرٗا فِي يَوۡمِ نَحۡسٖ مُّسۡتَمِرّٖ
transliteration: Inna arsalna AAalayhim reehan sarsaran fee yawmi nahsin mustamirrin
translation: We did indeed send upon them a furiously blowing wind on a day of constant calamity,

arabic: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمۡ أَعۡجَازُ نَخۡلٖ مُّنقَعِرٖ
transliteration: TanziAAu alnnasa kaannahum aAAjazu nakhlin munqaAAirin
translation: It [wind] swept away men as though they were trunks of uprooted palm-trees. ManzilI VII: 54: Qamar

arabic: فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
transliteration: Fakayfa kana AAathabee wanuthuri
translation: How then was My punishment and My warnings!

arabic: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرٖ
transliteration: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin
translation: And We have certainly made the Qur'aan easy for cultivating Firm Faith in and Remembrance of Me; but is there any to take heed?

arabic: كَذَّبَتۡ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
transliteration: Kaththabat thamoodu bialnnuthuri
translation: (The ancient tribe of) Thamood rejected warnings.

arabic: فَقَالُوٓاْ أَبَشَرٗا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدٗا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذٗا لَّفِي ضَلَٰلٖ وَسُعُرٍ
transliteration: Faqaloo abasharan minna wahidan nattabiAAuhu inna ithan lafee dalalin wasuAAurin
translation: They said, “Is it an individual man, amongst us all, that we should follow? Then we are indeed into error and madness.” ManzilI VII: 54: Qamar

arabic: أَءُلۡقِيَ ٱلذِّكۡرُ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۢ بَيۡنِنَا بَلۡ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٞ
transliteration: Aolqiya alththikru AAalayhi min baynina bal huwa kaththabun ashirun
translation: Is the Zikr [divine revelation] bestowed only upon him, amongst us all? Nay, but he is an insolent liar.

arabic: سَيَعۡلَمُونَ غَدٗا مَّنِ ٱلۡكَذَّابُ ٱلۡأَشِرُ
transliteration: SayaAAlamoona ghadan mani alkaththabu alashiru
translation: To-morrow they shall know who the insolent liar is!

arabic: إِنَّا مُرۡسِلُواْ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتۡنَةٗ لَّهُمۡ فَٱرۡتَقِبۡهُمۡ وَٱصۡطَبِرۡ
transliteration: Inna mursiloo alnnaqati fitnatan lahum fairtaqibhum waistabir
translation: We are indeed sending the she-camel by way of a test for them. Just watch them and have patience! ManzilI VII: 54: Qamar

arabic: وَنَبِّئۡهُمۡ أَنَّ ٱلۡمَآءَ قِسۡمَةُۢ بَيۡنَهُمۡۖ كُلُّ شِرۡبٖ مُّحۡتَضَرٞ
transliteration: Wanabbihum anna almaa qismatun baynahum kullu shirbin muhtadarun
translation: And tell them that the water is to be shared among them; every drink to be accounted for!

arabic: فَنَادَوۡاْ صَاحِبَهُمۡ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
transliteration: Fanadaw sahibahum fataAAata faAAaqara
translation: But then they prevailed upon one of their companions to take hold of and hamstrung (her).

arabic: فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
transliteration: Fakayfa kana AAathabee wanuthuri
translation: How then was My punishment and My warnings!

arabic: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ صَيۡحَةٗ وَٰحِدَةٗ فَكَانُواْ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلۡمُحۡتَظِرِ
transliteration: Inna arsalna AAalayhim sayhatan wahidatan fakanoo kahasheemi almuhtathiri
translation: We sent upon them just one loud, piercing sound, and they became as the dry twigs used by the builder of a cattle-fold. ManzilI VII: 54: Qamar

arabic: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرٖ
transliteration: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin
translation: And We have certainly made the Qur'aan easy for cultivating Firm Faith in and Remembrance of Me; but is there any to take heed?

arabic: كَذَّبَتۡ قَوۡمُ لُوطِۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
transliteration: Kaththabat qawmu lootin bialnnuthuri
translation: Lot’s people rejected warnings.

arabic: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٖۖ نَّجَّيۡنَٰهُم بِسَحَرٖ
transliteration: Inna arsalna AAalayhim hasiban illa ala lootin najjaynahum bisaharin
translation: We did indeed send a violent storm upon them all save the family of Lot, whom We saved in the wee hours before dawn ManzilI VII: 54: Qamar

arabic: نِّعۡمَةٗ مِّنۡ عِندِنَاۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي مَن شَكَرَ
transliteration: NiAAmatan min AAindina kathalika najzee man shakara
translation: As favour from Us. Thus do We reward a grateful one.

arabic: وَلَقَدۡ أَنذَرَهُم بَطۡشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوۡاْ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
transliteration: Walaqad antharahum batshatana fatamaraw bialnnuthuri
translation: And he did warn them of Our Grip, but they had doubts on the veracity of the warnings!

arabic: وَلَقَدۡ رَٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيۡفِهِۦ فَطَمَسۡنَآ أَعۡيُنَهُمۡ فَذُوقُواْ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
transliteration: Walaqad rawadoohu AAan dayfihi fatamasna aAAyunahum fathooqoo AAathabee wanuthuri
translation: And they did try to seduce him about his guests. So We blinded their eyes, “Taste now My punishment and My warnings!”

arabic: وَلَقَدۡ صَبَّحَهُم بُكۡرَةً عَذَابٞ مُّسۡتَقِرّٞ
transliteration: Walaqad sabbahahum bukratan AAathabun mustaqirrun
translation: And the punishment decreed did befall them early in the morning. ManzilI VII: 54: Qamar

arabic: فَذُوقُواْ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
transliteration: Fathooqoo AAathabee wanuthuri
translation: “Taste then My punishment and My warnings!”

arabic: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرٖ
transliteration: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin
translation: And We have certainly made the Qur'aan easy for cultivating Firm Faith in and Remembrance of Me; but is there any to take heed?

arabic: وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ
transliteration: Walaqad jaa ala firAAawna alnnuthuru
translation: And warnings did come to the house of Pharaoh

arabic: كَذَّبُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذۡنَٰهُمۡ أَخۡذَ عَزِيزٖ مُّقۡتَدِرٍ
transliteration: Kaththaboo biayatina kulliha faakhathnahum akhtha AAazeezin muqtadirin
translation: They denied all Our Signs. Therefore, We gripped them with a mighty, powerful Grip. ManzilI VII: 54: Qamar

arabic: أَكُفَّارُكُمۡ خَيۡرٞ مِّنۡ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكُمۡ أَمۡ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٞ فِي ٱلزُّبُرِ
transliteration: Akuffarukum khayrun min olaikum am lakum baraatun fee alzzuburi
translation: Are your Truth-suppressors better than those [mentioned above], or have you some immunity [decreed for them] in the Scriptures?

arabic: أَمۡ يَقُولُونَ نَحۡنُ جَمِيعٞ مُّنتَصِرٞ
transliteration: Am yaqooloona nahnu jameeAAun muntasirun
translation: Or do they claim they are a united front?

arabic: سَيُهۡزَمُ ٱلۡجَمۡعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ
transliteration: Sayuhzamu aljamAAu wayuwalloona alddubura
translation: The front will soon be routed and put to flight.

arabic: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوۡعِدُهُمۡ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدۡهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
transliteration: Bali alssaAAatu mawAAiduhum waalssaAAatu adha waamarru
translation: Moreover, the Hour (the time when the present world will end and the Hereafter begin) is their tryst with destiny, and the Hour shall be more grievous and bitter. ManzilI VII: 54: Qamar

arabic: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ فِي ضَلَٰلٖ وَسُعُرٖ
transliteration: Inna almujrimeena fee dalalin wasuAAurin
translation: The sinners are indeed into error and madness.

arabic: يَوۡمَ يُسۡحَبُونَ فِي ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمۡ ذُوقُواْ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
transliteration: Yawma yushaboona fee alnnari AAala wujoohihim thooqoo massa saqara
translation: The Day they are dragged into the Fire upon their faces to taste the feel of Hell!

arabic: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقۡنَٰهُ بِقَدَرٖ
transliteration: Inna kulla shayin khalaqnahu biqadarin
translation: We have indeed created everything to a measure. ManzilI VII: 54: Qamar
notes: As I study this Verse, my eyes go to the hair on my hand. These never grow beyond an inch or so – unlike the hair on my head or chin! And I bow my head to divine Wisdom! Every little thing in the entire Universe is so tailor-made to perfection, Alhamdulillah!

arabic: وَمَآ أَمۡرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٰحِدَةٞ كَلَمۡحِۭ بِٱلۡبَصَرِ
transliteration: Wama amruna illa wahidatun kalamhin bialbasari
translation: And Our Command is just one! Like the twinkling of an eye!

arabic: وَلَقَدۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَآ أَشۡيَاعَكُمۡ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرٖ
transliteration: Walaqad ahlakna ashyaAAakum fahal min muddakirin
translation: And We did destroy the likes of you; but is there any to take heed?

arabic: وَكُلُّ شَيۡءٖ فَعَلُوهُ فِي ٱلزُّبُرِ
transliteration: Wakullu shayin faAAaloohu fee alzzuburi
translation: And everything they did is in the Records!

arabic: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٖ وَكَبِيرٖ مُّسۡتَطَرٌ
transliteration: Wakullu sagheerin wakabeerin mustatarun
translation: And everything, small and big, is duly recorded. ManzilI VII: 54: Qamar

arabic: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ فِي جَنَّـٰتٖ وَنَهَرٖ
transliteration: Inna almuttaqeena fee jannatin wanaharin
translation: The pious indeed will be among gardens and rivers 55.

arabic: فِي مَقۡعَدِ صِدۡقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٖ مُّقۡتَدِرِۭ
transliteration: Fee maqAAadi sidqin AAinda maleekin muqtadirin
translation: Seated in honour near the Most Powerful King.
